ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ ١
ayahs.translation: When the Occurrence occurs,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ ٢
ayahs.translation: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌ ٣
ayahs.translation: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا ٤
ayahs.translation: When the earth is shaken with convulsion

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا ٥
ayahs.translation: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَانَتْ هَبَآءً مُّنۢبَثًّا ٦
ayahs.translation: And become dust dispersing,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٲجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً ٧
ayahs.translation: And you become [of] three kinds:

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ ٨
ayahs.translation: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْــَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْــَٔمَةِ ٩
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the left - what are companions of the left?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And the forerunners, the forerunners -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ ١١
ayahs.translation: Those are the ones brought near [to Allāh]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ ١٢
ayahs.translation: In the Gardens of Pleasure,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٣
ayahs.translation: A [large] company of the former peoples

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ١٤
ayahs.translation: And a few of the later peoples,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ ١٥
ayahs.translation: On thrones woven [with ornament],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُّتَّكِــِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ ١٦
ayahs.translation: Reclining on them, facing each other.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٲنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ ١٨
ayahs.translation: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ ١٩
ayahs.translation: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: And fruit of what they select

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ ٢١
ayahs.translation: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُوِٕ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: جَزَآءَۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعْمَلُونَ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: As reward for what they used to do.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا لَغۡوًا وَّلَا تَاۡثِيۡمًا ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
ayahs.transliteration: Laa yasma'oona feehaa laghwanw Wa-laa taaseemaa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّا قِيلاً سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا ٢٦
ayahs.translation: Only a saying [of] peace, peace.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى سِدْرٍ مَّخْضُودٍ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَظِلٍّ مَّمْدُودٍ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: And shade extended.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآءٍ مَّسْكُوبٍ ٣١
ayahs.translation: And water poured out

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: And fruit, abundant [and varied],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفُرُشٍ مَّرْفُوعَةٍ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: And [upon] beds raised high.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءً ٣٥
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We have produced them [i.e., the women of Paradise] in a [new] creation

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُنَّ أَبْكَارًا ٣٦
ayahs.translation: And made them virgins,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عُرُبًا أَتْرَابًا ٣٧
ayahs.translation: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: For the companions of the right [who are]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: A company of the former peoples

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: And a company of the later peoples.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ ٤١
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى سَمُومٍ وَحَمِيمٍ ٤٢
ayahs.translation: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَظِلٍّ مِّن يَحْمُومٍ ٤٣
ayahs.translation: And a shade of black smoke,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا بَارِدٍ وَلَا كَرِيمٍ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: Neither cool nor beneficial.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُواْ قَبْلَ ذَٲلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوۡا قَبۡلَ ذٰ لِكَ مُتۡرَفِيۡنَۚ  ۖ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَانُواْ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: And they used to persist in the great violation,

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكَانُوۡا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ ۙ اَٮِٕذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَّعِظَامًا ءَاِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوۡثُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kaanoo yaqooloona a'izaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaabanw Wa-izaaman 'ainnaa lamab'oosoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: And our forefathers [as well]?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْأَخِرِينَ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Indeed, the former and later peoples

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ ٥١
ayahs.translation: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَأَكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ ٥٢
ayahs.translation: Will be eating from trees of zaqqūm

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَالِــُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ ٥٣
ayahs.translation: And filling with it your bellies

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ ٥٤
ayahs.translation: And drinking on top of it from scalding water.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ ٥٥
ayahs.translation: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذَا نُزُلُهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ ٥٦
ayahs.translation: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ ٥٧
ayahs.translation: We have created you, so why do you not believe?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ ٥٨
ayahs.translation: Have you seen that which you emit?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ ٥٩
ayahs.translation: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?

ayahs.textUthmani: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ ٦٠
ayahs.textIndopak: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ الۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوۡقِيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu qaddarnaa baina-kumul mawta Wa-maa nahnu bimasbooqeen

ayahs.textUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ ٦١
ayahs.textIndopak: عَلٰٓى اَنۡ نُّبَدِّلَ اَمۡثَالَـكُمۡ وَنُـنۡشِئَكُمۡ فِىۡ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
ayahs.transliteration: Alaaa an nubaddila amsaalakum Wa-nunshi'akum fee maa laa ta'lamoon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ ٦٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَـقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ النَّشۡاَةَ الۡاُوۡلٰى فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ ٦٣
ayahs.translation: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٲرِعُونَ ٦٤
ayahs.translation: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?

ayahs.textUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ ٦٥
ayahs.textIndopak: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَـعَلۡنٰهُ حُطَامًا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
ayahs.transliteration: Law nashaaa'u laja'al-naahu hutaaman fazaltum tafakkahoon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ ٦٦
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ ٦٧
ayahs.translation: Rather, we have been deprived."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ ٦٨
ayahs.translation: And have you seen the water that you drink?

ayahs.textUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ ٦٩
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاَنۡـتُمۡ اَنۡزَلۡـتُمُوۡهُ مِنَ الۡمُزۡنِ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الۡمُنۡزِلُوۡنَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
ayahs.transliteration: A-antum anzaltumoohu minal muzni am nahnul munziloon

ayahs.textUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ ٧٠
ayahs.textIndopak: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنٰهُ اُجَاجًا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُوۡنَ‏

words.translation: then why are you not grateful
then why are you not grateful

ayahs.translation: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
ayahs.transliteration: Law nashaaa'u ja'alnaahu ujaajan falaw-laa tashkuroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ ٧١
ayahs.translation: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?

ayahs.textUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِــُٔونَ ٧٢
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاَنۡتُمۡ اَنۡشَاۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَاۤ اَمۡ نَحۡنُ الۡمُنۡشِـُٔـوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
ayahs.transliteration: A-antum anshaatum shajaratahaaa am nahnul munshi'oon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ ٧٣

words.translation: for the wayfarers in the desert

ayahs.translation: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٧٤
ayahs.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٲقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ ٧٥
ayahs.translation: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَقَسَمٌ لَّوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ ٧٦
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ لَقُرْءَانٌ كَرِيمٌ ٧٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is a noble Qur’ān.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مَّكْنُونٍ ٧٨
ayahs.translation: In a Register well-protected;.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ ٧٩
ayahs.translation: None touch it except the purified [i.e., the angels].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٨٠
ayahs.translation: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ ٨١
ayahs.translation: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ ٨٢
ayahs.translation: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ ٨٣
ayahs.translation: Then why, when it [i.e., the soul at death] reaches the throat

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ ٨٤
ayahs.translation: And you are at that time looking on -

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ ٨٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَنَحۡنُ اَقۡرَبُ اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡكُمۡ وَلٰـكِنۡ لَّا تُبۡصِرُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And We [i.e., Our angels] are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-nahnu aqrabu ilaihi minkum Wa-laakil laa tubsiroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ ٨٦
ayahs.translation: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ ٨٧
ayahs.translation: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ ٨٨
ayahs.translation: And if he [i.e., the deceased] was of those brought near [to Allāh],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ ٨٩
ayahs.translation: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٩٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّاۤ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنۡ اَصۡحٰبِ الۡيَمِيۡنِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And if he was of the companions of the right,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ammaaa in kaana min as-haabil yameen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَلَـٰمٌ لَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٩١
ayahs.translation: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ ٩٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّاۤ اِنۡ كَانَ مِنَ الۡمُكَذِّبِيۡنَ الضَّآلِّيۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ammaaa in kaana minal mukazzibeenad daaalleen

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ ٩٣
ayahs.translation: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَصْلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ ٩٤
ayahs.translation: And burning in Hellfire.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ ٩٥
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is the true certainty,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٩٦
ayahs.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
